title: Evaluation Request Schema
description: Schema for creating new evaluation requests in the Traigent platform

id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation request

configuration_id.description: Reference to the ID of the configuration to evaluate

experiment_run_id.description: Reference to the ID of the experiment run the configuration belongs to

experiment_id.description: Reference to the ID of the experiment

items.description: Reference to a metric ID (from measure_schema.json)

metrics.description: List of metric IDs to apply in this evaluation (optional, will use metrics from experiment configuration if not provided)
